---
title: "Schedule"
---
| Time |  |
| -------- | ------- |
| 08:30 - 09:15  | An Introduction to MCMC |
| 09:15 - 10:00 | The `samplr` package |
| 10:00 - 10:30 | **Break** |
| 10:30 -  11:00 | ABS: A cognitive model using MCMC |
| 11:00 - 11:40 | Using ABC for simulation-based inference |
| 11:40 - 11:55 | Future Directions and Discussion |
| 11:55 - 12:00 | Final Wrap-Up |
